data.name: 與長生狐一起的30天
data.detailed_description:
因為前任管理人去世，你被指派負責家鄉神社的清潔工作。起初只是例行差事，直到你遇見了神社中的住民，狐娘萬尾。她長年未與人類接觸，對你有所防備，卻也對你細心維護神社的舉動表示欣賞。

被這位神秘而孤獨的少女吸引，你決定靠近她的內心。三十天的打掃任務或許不再枯燥。到了最後，你是否能贏得狐娘的心呢？

每天你都要清理神社，隨著工作的進行，萬尾也會漸漸對你敞開心扉。提升她的信任度將解鎖更多互動，不僅限於她本人，還包括周遭環境。你只有30天的時間，必須精心安排打掃與陪伴的節奏。若能在期限內達成信任度100，就能迎來與可愛狐娘的完美結局。

時間管理

每天的行動次數有限，不同選擇會影響不同數值的變化。請謹慎安排每日計畫，做出最有利的選擇。

關係養成

每天可選的行動將影響你與萬尾之間的信賴程度。當神社打掃完畢時，你們的關係會走向哪裡？你會選擇留下來，還是轉身離去？

存檔進度

你可以隨時保存進度，方便重玩或修正選項。也許有一天你會想回頭看看，如果當時沒打盹、而是摸了她的尾巴，會不會結果不同？

data.short_description: 照料當地神社，並與居住其中的狐娘萬尾共度30天。在這款輕鬆的模擬遊戲中，你將在日常事務與建立感情間取得平衡。好好利用時間，也許她會讓你留下更久。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 韓文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Living with a Little Fox Girl
data.detailed_description:
You're tasked with cleaning the local shrine in your hometown after the previous caretaker passed away. At first, it seems like a chore, but then you're greeted by the shrine's resident, a fox girl named Mao. She's hesitant to approach you, having been out of touch with humans for a very long time. However, she seems to appreciate your efforts in cleaning the shrine she calls home.

Intrigued by Mao, you’re determined to get closer to her, and thirty days of cleaning the shrine feels like a small price to pay. Will you be able to win the fox girl’s heart by the end of your task?

Each day, you're expected to clean the shrine, and in doing so, Mao warms up to you more and more. Gaining her trust will unlock new interactions, both with her and with your surroundings. You only have 30 days, so manage your time wisely between responsibilities and spending time with Mao. Raise her trust level to 100 before the time runs out to achieve the perfect ending with this cute fox girl!

Raise Your Relationship

Every day, you will have certain actions to choose from, that determine whether you build trust with Mao. How will your relationship evolve by the time you finish cleaning the shrine? Will you choose to stay or move on?

Time Management

The number of actions you can take each day is limited, and each action determines what values increase, if any. Choose your actions wisely.

Saved Progress

You can save your progress at any time in case you want to revisit certain options before reaching the end of your shrine-cleaning task. Who knows, maybe you’ll regret taking that nap instead of fluffing her tail?

data.short_description: Care for a local shrine and befriend Mao, the fox girl who lives there. In this light-hearted simulation game, you’ll have 30 days to balance your time between your tasks and building a relationship with Mao. Use your time wisely, and who knows? Maybe she'll let you stay longer.
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
